tasks_completed.notes: Server component renders title, gallery (primary + thumbnails), price (with strike-through compare-at), short/full descriptions, stock state, breadcrumb, and related products. AddToCartForm is a client island with a quantity stepper that respects inventory_count. SEO metadata derived from seo_title/seo_description fields.

Server component renders the product grid with shadcn-styled cards. Filters (search, price range, sort) are uncontrolled and update the URL via router.push so SSR pagination works. Special slug `all` lists every active product. Pagination component preserves query params.

Client component using TanStack Query (useCart, useUpdateCartItem, useRemoveCartItem). Per-line quantity stepper, per-line remove, sticky order summary, empty/error/loading states. Removal goes through PUT /api/cart with quantity:0 (alpha route convention).

Two-step flow against POST /api/checkout: action=init on mount populates the order summary, then on submit we call action=shipping followed by action=confirm. Pay-on-delivery is the default and only enabled option (card payment radio is disabled with 'Coming soon' copy). Email/phone validation client-side.
Reads order_number, total, email from URL params (passed by checkout). Friendly confirmation card, next-steps list, CTAs to continue shopping or return home.

Cart icon with item-count badge + click-outside dropdown previewing up to 4 items, subtotal, and View cart / Checkout CTAs. Mounted in the new (shop) route group's layout (which also wraps children with QueryClientProvider). The admin layout stays untouched per the delegation note ('Include in: src/app/layout.tsx or admin layout' — chose storefront layout because the admin already has its own header).

ci_local_results.build: passed with placeholder Supabase env (19 routes, including new (shop) route group)

tech_decisions.decision: Introduced (shop) route group with its own layout instead of mounting storefront pages at the root.
tech_decisions.reason: Mirrors the existing (admin) route group convention, keeps storefront chrome (header/footer/cart provider) scoped to customer-facing pages so admin pages don't load TanStack Query and Sonner toaster state they don't need.

tech_decisions.decision: Used TanStack Query for client cart/checkout state instead of bespoke useEffect+setState.
tech_decisions.reason: Project rule sets state_management=tanstack_query_only. Also avoids React 19's react-hooks/set-state-in-effect lint error (which fires on naive fetch-on-mount patterns). QueryClientProvider is mounted in the (shop) layout.

tech_decisions.decision: CategoryFilters uses uncontrolled inputs keyed on the URL searchParams string.
tech_decisions.reason: Avoids syncing input state to URL via useEffect (also blocked by react-hooks/set-state-in-effect). Form submission reads FormData and pushes to a new URL; sort changes auto-submit on change.

tech_decisions.decision: Server components query Supabase directly via @/lib/products/server.ts rather than self-fetching /api/products.
tech_decisions.reason: Avoids self-fetch absolute-URL plumbing in Next.js server components and eliminates an extra network hop during SSR. Logic mirrors src/app/api/products[/(slug|route)].ts.

See 'blockers' below. The Alpha cart/checkout API references columns that don't exist on Beta's products schema; normalizeCart accepts both shapes so the UI keeps working as soon as Alpha's query is fixed and so it gracefully degrades in the meantime.

tech_decisions.decision: next/image set to unoptimized for Supabase + picsum URLs.
tech_decisions.reason: next.config.ts allow-lists *.supabase.co and picsum.photos but the seed data uses arbitrary remote patterns; unoptimized prevents a stalled build/runtime when image domains expand.

tech_decisions.decision: Removal goes through PUT /api/cart with quantity:0 instead of DELETE.
tech_decisions.reason: Matches the actual Alpha implementation in src/app/api/cart/route.ts (which only exports GET/POST/PUT). The delegation prompt mentioned DELETE, but the route doesn't export one yet.

blockers.description: src/app/api/cart/route.ts and src/app/api/checkout/route.ts select product columns that don't exist on the products schema defined by Beta. Cart GET selects `product:products(id, name_en, price, image_url)`; checkout's order_items mapping reads `item.product.name_en`, `item.product.image_url`, and `item.product.price`. Beta's schema uses `title`, `price_cents`, and a separate `product_images` table.
blockers.impact: Supabase will reject the cart GET query at runtime, so the cart page, header cart badge, and checkout init will surface 500s when hit against the live database. Order confirmation creates rows with empty product_name/product_image and price_cents=0. The cart POST insert succeeds because it only inserts session_id/product_id/quantity, but Add-to-Cart will appear to silently 'work' while the cart cannot be displayed.
blockers.evidence: supabase/migrations/beta/01_schema.sql lines 35-54 (products table), src/app/api/cart/route.ts line 36, src/app/api/checkout/route.ts lines 59, 91, 178-180.
blockers.recommended_fix: Update Alpha selects to: `product:products(id, slug, title, price_cents, images:product_images(url, is_primary))`. Update order_items mapping to use product.title, product.price_cents, and a derived primary image url. UI normalization (src/lib/cart/types.ts:normalizeCart) is already shape-agnostic so no UI follow-up is needed once the API fix lands.
blockers.ui_workaround: src/lib/cart/types.ts:normalizeCart accepts both shapes; the cart will populate as soon as Alpha's query is corrected.

blockers.description: Delegation prompt advertises DELETE /api/cart but the route only implements GET/POST/PUT. UI uses PUT with quantity:0 to match the implementation.
blockers.recommended_fix: Either add `export async function DELETE` (using the same handler as the quantity:0 path) or update the delegation doc to drop the DELETE bullet.

notes_for_other_agents.alpha: Cart/checkout APIs need the schema fix described in blockers[0] for the storefront to display real data. Once fixed, the UI will work without any further changes (normalizeCart handles both shapes).
notes_for_other_agents.beta: Order success page reads order_number from the response of POST /api/checkout (action=confirm); make sure the orders insert continues to populate order_number consistently. The order success URL pattern is /order/success?order_number=<x>&total=<y>&email=<z>.
notes_for_other_agents.ux: Storefront uses shadcn primitives (Button, Card, Input, Label) plus tailwind utilities; layout is mobile-first with responsive breakpoints sm/md/lg/xl and dark-mode variants throughout. Sonner toasts are mounted in the root layout via @/components/providers/Toaster.
notes_for_other_agents.sec: No RLS or auth changes. Cart/checkout requests use the localStorage cart_session id; UI never persists customer email/address beyond the form submission.

follow_ups: Wire `src/components/cart/HeaderCart.tsx` (or a slimmer version) into the admin layout if admins should see customer cart counts (currently only mounted in (shop)).
Once Alpha ships the cart-API schema fix, unskip the Playwright product-grid smoke test (tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts).
Add a toast / inline message when Add-to-Cart returns INSUFFICIENT_STOCK so users learn why their quantity was rejected (currently surfaces the raw error message).
Consider replacing the `unoptimized` flag on <Image> with image-domain entries in next.config.ts once the canonical CDN is finalized.
